sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n95996" key="spoggoth/ras" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">σπογγο-τήρας</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ου</itype>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ὁ</gen>, <sense id="n95996.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">sponge-watcher, a small creature like a spider which inhabits sponges</tr_>, <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Plu.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">2.980b</biblScope> </bibl>; cf. <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">πινοτήρης</foreign>.</sense> </entryFree>
